description:
Create a new Visit Attribute Type in OpenMRS with the following details:
- Name: 'Arrival Method'
- Description: 'Method of transport to the facility'
- Datatype: Free Text (org.openmrs.customdatatype.datatype.FreeTextDatatype)
- Min Occurs: 0
- Max Occurs: 1

Log in with username 'superman' and password 'Admin123'.

metadata.expected_description: Method of transport to the facility
